statement: In every magma, Equation 1615 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (z * z))`) implies Equation 1206 (`x = y * ((z * (w * y)) * u)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0104
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op z z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op w y)) u))
